title: Mellanna Siripalo Lyrics Theneer Viduthi Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Kousik, Mirudula
Song : Mellanna Siripalo
Lyrics : Murugan Manthiram
Music Director : SS Kumaran

Mellanna Siripalo, Jillena muraipalo,
En kannai imai thindrathe.
Kannukul vizhundhalo, kallukul mulaithalo
En nenjam ennai vendradhe.
kadhal ennum siragugal ennakena tharuvaalo
vaanam thaandi parandhida thunai enna varuvaalo ohh..

Mellanna Siripalo, Jillena muraipalo,
En kannai imai thindrathe.

Pandhakaran muli onnum sariyillakaa..
Moonu mudich-onnu poda sollukaa...

Eno adi eno, en idhayam mella udaithaai
Theeyaai oru theeyaai, uyril vandhu kudhithaai
Ennakena unnai padaithavan vandhal,
aayiram nanri solven
Aayidham indri por onru seithaai,
arai nodi ennai vendrai
Alzhaga iva-la-le, adiyodu thozhaindhene

Mellanna Siripalo, Jillena muraipalo,
En kannai imai thindrathe.
Kannukul vizhundhalo, kallukul mulaithalo
En nenjam ennai vendradhe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mellanna Siripalo?

The song Mellanna Siripalo expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, capturing the emotions of longing and connection.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Theneer Viduthi?

In Theneer Viduthi, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of Mellanna Siripalo?

The song is beautifully rendered by singers Kousik and Mirudula, whose voices complement each other perfectly.

Who composed the music for Mellanna Siripalo?

The music for Mellanna Siripalo was composed by SS Kumaran, known for his melodious tunes and engaging compositions.

When was Mellanna Siripalo released?

The song was released on February 19, 2011, as part of the Theneer Viduthi soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mellanna Siripalo, the romantic duet unfolds a tender narrative of love and longing, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the lead characters in Theneer Viduthi. The soothing melody, crafted by SS Kumaran, enhances the heartfelt lyrics penned by Murugan Manthiram. As Kousik and Mirudula's voices intertwine, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. This enchanting piece resonates with anyone who has experienced the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mellanna Siripalo from the Theneer Viduthi movie is a captivating duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Kousik and Mirudula, this song weaves a soothing melody that resonates with love and longing. Experience the magic of Mellanna Siripalo as it takes you on an emotional journey through its heartfelt lyrics and mesmerizing composition.
stanzaMeanings: Mellanna Siripalo, in a beautiful way, my eyes are filled with joy. When they fall into my eyes, my heart desires something.
Mellanna Siripalo, in a beautiful way, my eyes are filled with joy.
The person who is not good at anything, just say three times and let it go...

Oh, what is this, you have gently touched my heart. Like a flame, you have come into my life. If the one who created you comes, I will thank him a thousand times. Without a reason, you have done something, and you have come to me. Beautiful girl, I have surrendered to you.
Mellanna Siripalo, in a beautiful way, my eyes are filled with joy. When they fall into my eyes, my heart desires something.
